master_row.title: Relation: Q_T in Z
master_row.canonical_statement: D 006] does not relax into a lower-energy, non-functional state. Within the Furiene Spindle, this persistence is the prerequisite for maintaining the 310% Synergetic Gain over indefinite operational timescales. The mathematical core of ID 014 is the quantization of the Trawinistic Winding Number, $Q_T$. This charge is calculated as the integral of the second Chern class (the Pontryagin density) over the entangled toroidal manifold $T^2 \times T^2$. Because $Q_T$ is restricted to integer values ($Q_T \in \mathbb{Z}$), any infinitesimal perturbation of the field—such as thermal noise or mechanical vibration—is insufficient to trigger a transition to a different charge state. This "Topological Hard-Stop" creates an energy barrier that effectively "pins" the vacuum fluctuations to the nodal lattice. This is the rigorous proof for the Euler Stability Theorem ( $\chi=0$ ) [ID 352]; since the hypercubic grid
master_row.formation_note: Constructed as a quantization / integer condition from Q_T.

master_row.encyclopedia: Relation: Q_T in Z is a quantization / integer condition, written Q_T in Z. It imposes a quantization condition, restricting the allowed values to a discrete set. It is built from Q_T. Within the Trawin Zero Point registry it serves as one element of the framework's mathematical narrative.
